Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award [C.C.P. 1285, Et Seq.]
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS MICHAEL SCHINNER AND SCHINNER & SHAIN, LLP's Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award [C.C.P. 1285, Et Seq.].

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PETITIONERS Michael Schinner and Schinner & Shain, LLP's unopposed "petition to confirm attorney-client fee arbitration award [C.C.P. 1285]" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.
